jsonLd.title: 5paisa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!
